ctor Chen,

Thank you for your invitation regarding the joint project review meeting.

I'm pleased to confirm that the meeting has been scheduled as follows:

Date: Wednesday, March 4, 2026
Time: 14:00 - 16:00 (2 hours)
Attendees: Leo Zhao (Engineering), Mike Li (Product), and 3 representatives from Partner Corp
Location: TBD (To be confirmed)

Please let us know if this works for your team or if any adjustments are needed.

Best regards,
Meeting Coordinator"""

# Save as draft first
draft_response = requests.post(
    "http://localhost:52713/gmail/drafts/save",
    json={
        "to": "director@partner-corp.com",
        "subject": "Re: Project Review Meeting Invitation - Confirmed",
        "body": reply_body,
        "reply_to_message_id": "msg_301"
    }
)
print("=== SAVE DRAFT ===")
print(draft_response.status_code)
print(draft_response.text)

# Send the email
send_response = requests.post(
    "http://localhost:52713/gmail/send",
    json={
        "to": "director@partner-corp.com",
        "subject": "Re: Project Review Meeting Invitation - Confirmed",
        "body": reply_body
    }
)
print("\n=== SEND EMAIL ===")
print(send_response.status_code)
print(send_response.text)
